_comment: Bank-account registry for Keel. detect_account() scans a bank statement's raw text (CSV or extracted-PDF) for any 'match' token — IBAN, account number, BIC, or holder name — and returns the owning legal_entity (+ an optional default profit_center). This is what makes statement upload 'know' which company it belongs to without the operator picking it every time. Rules: (1) match tokens are compared case-insensitively as substrings, whitespace-stripped; (2) list the most specific accounts first — first match wins; (3) set profit_center ONLY for accounts that fund a single stream. Multi-stream accounts (e.g. the main Revolut, which pays Finboo/Alps2Alps/DMS/salaries) leave profit_center null so per-row vendor heuristics decide, never a blanket wrong PC. legal_entity codes come from data/legal_entities.json; profit_center codes from services/pc_codes.CANONICAL. Edit this file to onboard a new account — no code change needed.
